name: Atlantic Lithium Limited
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$0.3082. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.3092 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.3082, stop A$0.2970, target A$0.3200. Risk/reward is 1.06:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
